subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been sent down by the Sovereign of the Kingdom unto them that have believed in God, the Lord of the worlds. Verily, they who have been barred from this Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله مالک الملکوت لمن آمن بالله رب العالمین ان الذین منعوا عن هذا الامر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @call to action, @chastisement and requital
